transition.guideLineOnEnter: This dusty corner holds a spark of something extraordinary.

microLifeEffects.description: Dust motes drift in weak light
A bare bulb flickers overhead, threatening to die
Shifting junk casts long, creeping shadows
A rusty ceiling fan wobbles in slow rotation

transition.guideLineOnEnter: Careful with those wires. Some of them still carry current.

microLifeEffects.description: Circuit board LEDs blink in irregular patterns
Faint static crackles along exposed wire bundles
Old CRT monitors emit a dim, greenish glow
Tiny sparks fly from loose wire connections

transition.guideLineOnEnter: The steam hisses with pressure. Something is building below.

microLifeEffects.description: Heat distortion ripples above the vent grates
Jets of white steam burst from pressurized vents
Pressure shifts create brief gusts of hot air
Industrial fans spin in the steam, scattering vapor trails

transition.guideLineOnEnter: The tower broadcasts endlessly. Someone — or something — is listening.

microLifeEffects.description: Electromagnetic haze drifts around the antenna array
Crackling static sparks cascade down the tower struts
Signal strength indicators pulse on broadcast equipment
The guide flickers in response to incoming signal bursts

transition.guideLineOnEnter: Every reading here is precise. The lab demands accuracy.

microLifeEffects.description: Sensor readouts scroll across wall-mounted displays
Sensor calibration LEDs glow in precise sequences
Calibration arms perform slow, deliberate test sweeps
Tiny lens flares refract from sensor surfaces

transition.guideLineOnEnter: The line never stops. Every piece has its place.

microLifeEffects.description: Assembly drones ferry components along invisible rails
Rhythmic heat pulses from welding stations fill the air
Cooling units whir above overheating assembly stations
Conveyor segments glide forward in an endless loop
Station indicators flash green-yellow-red as work progresses

transition.guideLineOnEnter: These pipes go deeper than the blueprints show. Stay close.

microLifeEffects.description: Cold air shimmers where coolant meets warm surfaces
Coolant mist pools in low passages of the labyrinth
Pipes expand and contract with each coolant cycle
Condensation droplets form and fall from frozen pipes

transition.guideLineOnEnter: Every byte here has a history. The vault remembers everything.

microLifeEffects.description: Server rack displays cycle through archived data feeds
Access indicators blink as data is read and written
Glowing data fragments drift between server columns
Sorting mechanisms quietly rearrange archived blocks
Tall server racks cast deep geometric shadows

transition.guideLineOnEnter: Gravity bends here. Even light takes the long way around.

microLifeEffects.description: Small debris orbits slowly around the gravity anchor
Shadows warp and stretch toward the gravitational center
The gravity anchor pulses with deep, rhythmic force
Gravitational fluctuations create invisible pressure waves

transition.guideLineOnEnter: The anomaly is contained. For now. Do not provoke it.

microLifeEffects.description: Anomalous discharge arcs across the containment field
A faint haze bleeds from the containment barrier edges
The guide recoils subtly when the anomaly flares
Energy leaks create shimmering distortions near the sphere
Warning indicators cycle through red and amber states

transition.guideLineOnEnter: Thousands of connections fire at once. This is where thought begins.

microLifeEffects.description: Neural haze floats between branching synapse pathways
Synaptic nodes fire in cascading sequences of light
The synapse tree pulses with a slow, organic rhythm
Thought sparks leap between neural branches

transition.guideLineOnEnter: The heat here shapes everything. Even the air obeys the forge.

microLifeEffects.description: Intense heat distortion radiates from the forge mouth
Glowing embers drift upward from molten metal
Waves of searing heat roll outward with each forge cycle
Massive bellows pump air into the forge core rhythmically
The anvil heart glows brighter with each forging pulse

transition.guideLineOnEnter: Every sound returns changed. The chamber listens and answers.

microLifeEffects.description: Sound waves become visible as shimmering ripples in the air
The guide hums along with the chamber's resonant frequency
Echoed reflections cast overlapping phantom shadows
Resonating objects vibrate gently on every surface

transition.guideLineOnEnter: Balance is not found. It is built, note by note, light by light.

microLifeEffects.description: Golden light motes drift through stained-glass beams
The altar breathes with a slow, harmonious rhythm
Suspended chimes sway and ring in perfect intervals
The guide resonates with the cathedral's tonal field

transition.guideLineOnEnter: Inside this box, the rules are different. Expect the impossible.

microLifeEffects.description: Reality glitches flicker at the edges of perception
Impossible shadows point in contradictory directions
A blurring haze obscures where one surface ends and another begins
Fragments of repeated geometry float and reassemble

transition.guideLineOnEnter: You can see the whole system from here. Every orbit, every trajectory.

microLifeEffects.description: Maintenance drones patrol the habitat exterior in slow arcs
Distant stars drift past viewport windows
Orbital tracking displays map satellite trajectories
Habitat rings rotate with imperceptible grace
Atmospheric recyclers create gentle pressure currents

transition.guideLineOnEnter: Worlds are born in this heat. Tread carefully among the new suns.

microLifeEffects.description: Planetary heat radiates from newborn world surfaces
Cosmic dust spirals into accretion disks around forge points
Stellar winds sweep through the forge with scorching intensity
The stellar anvil throbs with planetary-scale energy
Nebula mist curls around forming planetary bodies

transition.guideLineOnEnter: Time moves differently near the engine. Trust the pendulum, not your eyes.

microLifeEffects.description: Clock gears rotate at mismatched speeds across the room
Temporal discharge crackles where timelines overlap
Time-echoed shadows trail behind every moving object
Crystallized time fragments hover in frozen suspension

transition.guideLineOnEnter: This is the foundation of everything. The kernel that holds reality together.

microLifeEffects.description: Reality haze drifts from exposed kernel surfaces
Kernel disruptions send cascading static through the chamber
The kernel seed beats with the heartbeat of reality itself
Kernel fragments orbit the seed in complex geometric patterns
The guide grows quiet and reverent near the kernel seed

transition.guideLineOnEnter: There is nothing left to prove. Only stillness, and the infinite.

microLifeEffects.description: Points of light slowly dissolve into the surrounding void
The void itself has edges, soft and barely perceptible
The void lotus opens and closes with infinite patience
A gentle rotation pervades everything, barely noticeable

onboardingSteps.title: Tap the Core
onboardingSteps.description: Tap the central node to generate resources and build momentum.

onboardingSteps.title: Purchase an Upgrade
onboardingSteps.description: Spend your earned coins on an upgrade node to increase production or unlock new abilities.

onboardingSteps.title: Respond to an Event
onboardingSteps.description: Events appear during gameplay with choices that affect your room. Read carefully and decide.

onboardingSteps.title: Build a Combo
onboardingSteps.description: Tap rapidly to build a combo multiplier. Higher combos mean more coins per tap. Keep the rhythm going.

onboardingSteps.title: Perform a Prestige
onboardingSteps.description: Reset your progress in the current room to earn prestige bonuses that carry forward permanently.

onboardingSteps.title: Try a Side Activity
onboardingSteps.description: Each room has optional side activities that reward rare items, companions, and secret knowledge.

onboardingSteps.title: Choose a Route
onboardingSteps.description: Routes define your play style. Each one modifies bonuses, events, and available upgrades differently.

onboardingSteps.title: Complete a Room
onboardingSteps.description: You have finished all objectives in this room. A new room awaits with fresh challenges and mechanics.

onboardingSteps.title: Discover an Archive Entry
onboardingSteps.description: Archives preserve knowledge about the AI's history. Collect entries to unlock deeper lore and hidden bonuses.

onboardingSteps.title: Witness a Transformation
onboardingSteps.description: As you progress, the room itself transforms. The environment evolves to reflect your achievements.

onboardingSteps.title: Meet a Companion
onboardingSteps.description: Companions are entities that assist you. Each has unique traits, abilities, and room affinities.

onboardingSteps.title: Uncover a Secret
onboardingSteps.description: Secrets are hidden throughout every room. Finding them reveals special rewards and forbidden knowledge.

onboardingSteps.title: Encounter a Room Law
onboardingSteps.description: Room laws are unique rules that change how a room works. Adapt your strategy to work within or around them.

onboardingSteps.title: Survive a Hazard
onboardingSteps.description: Hazards are dangerous conditions that threaten your progress. Manage them quickly or suffer consequences.

onboardingSteps.title: Achieve Mastery
onboardingSteps.description: Mastery goals challenge you to replay rooms under special conditions for exclusive rewards and recognition.

glossaryEntries.definition: A multiplier that increases with rapid taps. Higher combos boost tap output. Decays after 2 seconds of inactivity.
The base amount of coins generated by a single tap. Increased by upgrades, combos, and route bonuses.
An automated production unit that generates coins over time. Each generator can be leveled up to increase its output.
A purchasable node on the technology tree that provides production increases, multipliers, or new mechanic unlocks.
A voluntary reset of room progress that grants permanent bonuses. Higher prestige levels yield greater rewards.
A themed environment with its own upgrade tree, mechanics, events, and secrets. Complete one room to unlock the next.
A special rule unique to a specific room that modifies core mechanics. Room laws cannot be bypassed and must be adapted to.
A timed occurrence that presents choices affecting production, resources, or room state. Events vary by room and route.
A play style archetype that modifies bonuses, event pools, and available upgrades. Choose one route per run.
An entity that accompanies you through rooms. Each companion has unique traits, abilities, and room affinities that provide passive bonuses.
An optional room-specific challenge that rewards rare items, companion drops, or secret unlocks upon completion.
A collection of discovered lore entries that reveal the AI's history. Completing archives unlocks bonus effects and narrative depth.
A hidden element within a room discovered through exploration, specific actions, or clue-following. Secrets grant unique rewards.
A visible environmental change triggered by reaching upgrade milestones. Each room has multiple transformation stages.
Post-completion challenges for a room. Mastery goals test specific skills and reward relic fragments or codex bonuses.
A dangerous condition that emerges during gameplay. Hazards reduce production or threaten progress if not managed promptly.
A factor applied to coin generation from taps, generators, or events. Multiple multipliers can stack together.
Coins accumulated while the game is closed. Calculated from production rate and elapsed time, capped at a configurable maximum.
The primary currency earned through tapping and generators. Spent on upgrades, events, and side activities.
A grouping of rooms sharing a technological theme. Each era introduces new mechanics and escalates complexity.
A central visual feature in each room that evolves as you progress. Landmarks react to gameplay and accumulate visual scars.
A hidden relationship value between you and the guide. High trust unlocks special dialogue, reactions, and secret paths.
A measure of active threats in a room. Higher danger increases hazard frequency but may also boost rare event chances.
A room mechanic that accumulates with aggressive actions. Excessive heat triggers hazards and can scar the room landmark.
An AI companion that provides hints, reacts to your decisions, and evolves its personality based on your play style and trust level.
